column4: A large archway leads into a complex of training facilities. A sign reads: 'Push Beyond Your Limits.'
column13: A waiting area outside sealed chambers. Monitors display the gravity levels inside. Some show 100x.
column19:
,8003|Gravity Chamber — 2x|training_grounds|The air feels heavy. Movement requires effort. A good starting point for gravity training.|train|||||,8004|Gravity Chamber — 10x|training_grounds|Every step is a struggle. Your body weighs ten times normal. Sweat pools on the floor instantly.|train|||||,8005|Gravity Chamber — 50x|training_grounds|Breathing is labor. Standing is triumph. The strongest warriors train here for minutes at a time.|train|||||,
,8006
column22: A complex obstacle course stretches ahead. Walls to climb, pits to jump, targets to hit.
column28:
,8007|Obstacle Course — Mid|training_grounds|Swinging pendulums and balance beams. One wrong step and you start over.|train|||||,8008|Sparring Arena — Center|training_grounds|A large circular arena with padded floors. Training partners of various skill levels wait.|train|||||,8009|Sparring Arena — Advanced|training_grounds|The advanced ring. No padding. The partners here don't pull punches.|train|||||,8010|Meditation Chamber|training_grounds|A perfectly silent room. Cushions on the floor. The walls absorb all sound and distraction.|safe|||||,
,8011|Obstacle Course — End|training_grounds|The final stretch. Moving targets and timed gates. Your score is displayed on a board.|train|||||,8012|Weights Room|training_grounds|Racks of increasingly absurd weights. The heaviest ones have dents in the floor beneath them.|train|||||,8013
column31: The main crossroads of the training complex. Paths lead to different specializations.
column37:
,8014|Target Range|training_grounds|Ranged combat training. Targets at various distances. Some move. Some shoot back.|train|||||,8015|Elemental Chamber — Fire|training_grounds|A room where controlled flames test your resistance and reflexes. Don't stand still.|train|||||,
,,8016
column40: A circular running track. The surface changes — sand, mud, ice, uphill. It never gets easier.
column46:
,8017|Combat Simulator|training_grounds|Holographic enemies appear and attack. Difficulty scales to your level. Defeat is non-lethal but painful.|train|||||,8018|Elemental Chamber — Ice|training_grounds|Sub-zero temperatures. Ice forms on everything. Train your body to resist the cold.|train|||||,8019|Elemental Chamber — Lightning|training_grounds|Electrical discharges arc between pylons. Dodge or endure. Both build strength.|train|||||,
,,8020
column49: Healing pools and rest areas. Your body repairs faster here. Essential after intense training.
column58: A door marked 'THE GAUNTLET.' Beyond it, the ultimate training challenge. Few complete it.
column64:
,8022|The Gauntlet — Phase 1|training_grounds|Wave after wave of training constructs. They don't stop until you do.|train|||||,8023|The Gauntlet — Phase 2|training_grounds|Harder. Faster. The constructs adapt to your fighting style.|train|||||,
,,,8024|The Gauntlet — Phase 3|training_grounds|The final phase. A single opponent that matches your exact power level. Victory means growth.|train|||||,8025|Hall of Records|training_grounds|A wall of plaques showing the fastest Gauntlet completion times. Your name could be here.|train|||||,,
